text: Invoice INV-2044 issued 2026-05-03 by Nour Trading LLC to Baghdad Medical Supplies for a total of 4,750 USD, due within 30 days.
Contract signed on 12 January 2026 between Al-Rafidain University (party A) and CloudEdge Ltd (party B) for annual platform support, value 18,000 USD, renewable yearly.
Patient referral: case 88231, referred by Dr. Huda Kareem on 2026-06-20 to the cardiology department, priority urgent.
